title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to help teachers introduce AI and machine learning foundations in school classrooms. The program provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and training for educators without computer science backgrounds and has reached students in over 165 countries.
